title: Infernal pickaxe
wikitext:
{{Infobox Item |version1 = Charged |version2 = Uncharged |name1 = Infernal pickaxe |name2 = Infernal pickaxe (uncharged) |image1 = [[File:Infernal pickaxe.png]] |image2 = [[File:Infernal pickaxe (uncharged).png]] |release = [[27 August]] [[2015]] |update = Cerberus - The Hellhound Boss |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = No |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = No |options1 = Wield, Check, Drop |options2 = Wield, Drop |wornoptions1 = Check |wornoptions2 = None |examine = A very powerful, fiery pickaxe. |value1 = 99801 |value2 = 99800 |weight = 2.400 |id1 = 13243 |id2 = 13244 }} {{Synced switch |version1 = [[File:Infernal pickaxe detail.png|left|130px]] |version2 = [[File:Infernal pickaxe (uncharged) detail.png|left|130px]] }} The '''infernal pickaxe''' is a special [[pickaxe]] that requires level 61 [[Mining]] to use and 60 [[Attack]] to wield. It is created by using a [[smouldering stone]] on a [[dragon pickaxe]], requiring level 85 [[Smithing]] to create (cannot be boosted), and starts with 5,000 charges. Doing so grants 200 Mining experience and 350 Smithing experience. [[File:Smouldering stone.gif|left|frame|A player uses a smouldering stone to create an infernal pickaxe.|267x267px]] Mining rocks with it equipped or in the inventory will give a 1/3 ''(33%)'' chance for the ore to automatically combust. This will '''destroy''' the ore, using one charge and granting roughly half of the Smithing experience based on the amount that would usually be gained when creating a bar from the ore. For rocks that cannot be smelted, Smithing experience will be gained based on the level required to mine the rock. At some mining spots, such as [[Motherlode Mine]], [[Volcanic Mine]], [[amethyst]], [[gem rocks]], [[crashed star]], or [[dense runestone]], the infernal pickaxe does not consume ores and acts as a regular dragon pickaxe. Players can '''only''' use the standard, tradeable dragon pickaxe to create the infernal pickaxe; attempting to use other variants will result the chatbox stating "''The cosmetically upgraded pickaxe is too beautiful to convert into an infernal pickaxe.''" The infernal pickaxe possesses the same [[special attack]] as the dragon pickaxe, which will boost a player's [[Mining]] level by 3. This consumes 100% special attack energy. When mining in the [[Mining Guild]], [[unidentified minerals]] can still be obtained when this effect consumes an ore. The effect can trigger alongside the bonus resource effect of the [[celestial ring]], consuming one or possibly both ores and granting experience for each. The infernal pickaxe cannot be reverted back to a tradeable dragon pickaxe or smouldering stone. If not protected on death in level 20 [[Wilderness]] or beyond, the infernal pickaxe is converted into {{coins|11000}}. On death in a high-risk PvP world up to level 20 Wilderness, the infernal pickaxe is sent to the player's [[grave]]. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |version1 = Charged |version2 = Uncharged |astab = +38 |aslash = -2 |acrush = +32 |amagic = 0 |arange = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = +1 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = +42 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = weapon |speed = 5 |attackrange = 1 |combatstyle = Pickaxe |image = [[File:Infernal pickaxe equipped.png|200px]] |altimage1 = [[File:Infernal pickaxe equipped female.png|200px]] |altimage2 = [[File:Infernal pickaxe (uncharged) equipped female.png|200px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Pickaxe|speed=5|attackrange=1}} ==Degradation== Upon creation, the infernal pickaxe starts with 5,000 charges, and consumes one charge each time its effect activates. When fully depleted, the pickaxe can still be used as a regular dragon pickaxe. However, it will remain untradeable. Recharging the infernal pickaxe requires another smouldering stone or dragon pickaxe. {{#vardefine:bestcost|{{#vardefine:pickaxecost|{{GEP|Dragon pickaxe}}}}{{#vardefine:stonecost|{{GEP|Smouldering stone}}}}{{min|{{#var:pickaxecost}}|{{#var:stonecost}}}}}} {|class="wikitable" !Item !Name !Cost !Cost per Charge |- |{{plinkt|Smouldering stone}} |{{Coins|{{#var:stonecost}}}} |{{Coins|{{#var:stonecost}}/5000}} |- |{{plinkt|Dragon pickaxe}} |{{Coins|{{#var:pickaxecost}}}} |{{Coins|{{#var:pickaxecost}}/5000}} |- |} ==Experience gains== {{Incomplete|2 decimal values (for iron and adamantite) are impossible because of game engine flooring, missing values for sandstone blocks}} {|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" !colspan="2"|Ore !Level !Smithing xp !Cost/XP |- |[[File:Copper ore.png]] |[[Copper ore]] |1 |3.6 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 3.6}} |- |[[File:Tin ore.png]] |[[Tin]] |1 |3.6 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 3.6}} |- |[[File:Blurite ore.png]] |[[Blurite ore]] |10 |4 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 4}} |- |[[File:Iron ore.png]] |[[Iron ore|Iron]] |15 |5.5 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 6.25}} |- |[[File:Silver ore.png]] |[[Silver ore]] |20 |5.5 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 5.5}} |- |[[File:Coal.png]] |[[Coal]] |30 |6 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 6}} |- |[[File:Sandstone_(10kg).png]] |[[Sandstone]] |35 |6-21 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 13.5}} |- |[[File:Gold ore.png]] |[[Gold ore]] |40 |9 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 9}} |- |[[File:Granite_(5kg).png]] |[[Granite]] |45 |7.2 (500g) 13.2 (2kg)
22.2 (5kg) |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 13.5}} |- |[[File:Mithril ore.png]] |[[Mithril ore]] |55 |12 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 12}} |- |[[File:Adamantite ore.png]] |[[Adamantite ore]] |70 |18.75 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 18.75}} |- |[[File:Runite ore.png]] |[[Runite ore]] |85 |25 |{{Coins|-{{#var:bestcost}} / 5000 / 25}} |} ==Creation== {{Recipe |skill1 = Mining |skill1lvl = 61 |skill1boostable = No |skill1exp = 200 |skill2 = Smithing |skill2lvl = 85 |skill2boostable = No |skill2exp = 350 |members = Yes |ticks = 3 |mat1 = Dragon pickaxe |mat2 = Smouldering stone |output1 = Infernal pickaxe |output1cost = No }} ==Products== {{Uses material list|Infernal pickaxe}} ==Treasure Trails== {{EmoteClueHeader}} {{EmoteClue|tier=master|emote=Spin|location=West of the [[Soul Altar]]|item1=Infernal pickaxe|item2=helm of neitiznot|item3=rune boots|cost={{GEP|Dragon pickaxe}}+{{GEP|Smouldering stone}}|variation=dragon pickaxe}} {{EmoteClueBottom}} ==Used in recommended equipment== {{Used in recommended equipment|Infernal pickaxe}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 22 October 2015 |update = Abyssal Bludgeon Buff |poll = |change = Highlighted the game message for infernal tools running out of charges. }} {{Subject changes |date = 10 September 2015 |update = Slayer Assignment Rework |change = The smithing experience granted when mining granite or sandstone with the infernal pickaxe has been tripled. }} {{Subject changes footer}} {{Upgraded equipment}} {{Pickaxe}} {{Cerberus}} [[Category:Warm clothing]] [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]] [[Category:Items with charges]] [[Category:Upgraded equipment]] [[Category:Temporary skill boost]] [[Category:Mining boosting items]]
